Contact Me

Hello, I'm

Sarthak Ganguly

A passionate web developer and designer creating beautiful, functional, and user-centered digital experiences.

View Work About Me

What I Do

Web Development

Building responsive and performant websites using modern technologies.

UI/UX Design

Designing intuitive user interfaces with a focus on user experience.

API Integration

Connecting front-end applications with robust back-end services.

Web Development

E-commerce Platform

This project involved building a complete e-commerce solution from scratch. It features a custom shopping cart, secure Stripe payment integration, and a comprehensive admin dashboard for inventory management. The frontend was optimized for speed and SEO, resulting in a 40% increase in conversion rates.

Go to Project

Corporate Website

Designed and developed a corporate website for a mid-sized enterprise. The focus was on creating a professional, trustworthy brand image while ensuring lightning-fast load times. Built with a headless CMS to allow the marketing team to easily update content without developer intervention.

Go to Project

Portfolio Template

A highly customizable and responsive portfolio template designed specifically for photographers and designers. It includes dynamic masonry grids, lazy-loading images, and smooth page transitions to showcase visual work in the best possible light.

Go to Project

Blog Engine

A lightweight, markdown-driven blog engine built for developers. It supports syntax highlighting, tags, categories, and RSS feeds out of the box. The architecture ensures that articles are statically generated for maximum performance and security.

Go to Project

UI/UX Design

Mobile App Design

Led the UI/UX design for a new fitness tracking mobile application. Conducted user research to understand workout habits, created wireframes, and delivered high-fidelity prototypes. The final design increased daily active users by 25% through gamification elements.

Go to Project

Dashboard UI

Redesigned a complex B2B analytics dashboard to improve data readability and user workflow. By introducing a modular widget system and improving the color contrast for data visualization, we reduced the average time users spent searching for key metrics by half.

Go to Project

Brand Identity

Developed a comprehensive brand identity for a tech startup. This included logo design, typography selection, color palette creation, and a detailed brand guidelines document to ensure consistency across all marketing materials and product interfaces.

Go to Project

Wireframing Kit

Created an extensive wireframing kit for Figma to speed up the early stages of product design. The kit includes over 200 responsive components, from navigation bars to complex data tables, allowing designers to prototype ideas in minutes rather than hours.

Go to Project

API Integration

Payment Gateway

Implemented a robust payment processing system using the Stripe API. Handled complex scenarios including recurring subscriptions, prorated upgrades, and webhook listeners for asynchronous payment events to ensure data consistency.

Go to Project

Social Login

Integrated secure OAuth 2.0 authentication flows allowing users to sign in using their Google, GitHub, or Twitter accounts. This reduced the friction of the onboarding process and led to a 15% higher sign-up completion rate.

Go to Project

Weather Service

Built a microservice that aggregates data from multiple weather APIs. Implemented an intelligent Redis caching layer to minimize external API calls, reduce latency, and ensure the service remains available even if the upstream providers experience downtime.

Go to Project

CRM Sync

Developed a bidirectional synchronization tool between a custom web application and Salesforce. The integration ensures that customer data, lead statuses, and communication logs are always up-to-date across both platforms without manual data entry.

Go to Project
